senior.summary: Added schema cross-validation tests for default swarm YAML templates. Found and fixed missing `name` field on all 4 squads in squad-manifest.default.yaml (real bug caught by the new tests). Extended cli-init test coverage from 4 to 6 execution profiles. Closes sprint goal: Formalize swarm template schema. PR: AgentGuardHQ/agentguard#1251
